ecn_record_contract.stable_identity_rule: ecn_id and ecn_version must remain distinct from repository path, issue, pull request, commit, tree, and release identity
ecn_record_contract.affected_identity_rule: affected RFC versions, profiles, and requirement IDs must be exact
ecn_record_contract.authority_reference_rule: issuing_authority_ref is an abstract or opaque Authority reference and does not assign a private institutional role
ecn_record_contract.runtime_field_boundary: required_runtime_restriction_class declares the required restrictive class only; the ECN record does not implement, deploy, or authorize a runtime control
ecn_record_contract.canonical_time_rule: issued_at, effective_at, and expires_at must use an explicitly declared clock context

prohibited_effects: infer restore, cutover, or sealing authority
issuance_requirements: exact affected RFC versions, profiles, and requirement IDs

required_renewal_evidence: confirmation that the affected defect remains unresolved
published progress toward normal RFC revision, withdrawal, or replacement

expiry_policy.invariant: ECN expired != unsafe behavior automatically permitted
expiry_policy.specification_instrument_effect: expiry ends the ECN as a specification instrument
expiry_policy.continued_restriction_requirement: any continued restriction requires another valid governance basis

absolute_limit_policy.after_day_60: the ECN cannot remain permanent RFC text or be renewed again
absolute_limit_policy.critical_live_control_boundary: an affected critical live control may remain operationally restrictive only through a separately authorized emergency governance action
absolute_limit_policy.normalization_requirement: use a normal RFC revision, withdrawal, or replacement rather than silently treating the ECN as permanent text

review_and_history_requirements: urgency does not erase later review
urgency does not erase historical traceability
issuance, renewal, expiry, withdrawal, replacement, and supersession remain historically resolvable
affected claim and admission consequences remain explicit
authority_boundaries: this contract does not issue an ECN
this contract does not assign an issuing Authority
this contract does not modify production controls
this contract does not implement or deploy a runtime restriction
this contract does not authorize implementation, release, deployment, certification, risk acceptance, restore, cutover, or sealing
